## Gate-1 Spec PR (Required)

### Required Links (must be non-empty)
- Evidence dashboard URL: `https://brunogaosz.github.io/ljwx-deploy/`
- Evidence feed URL: `https://brunogaosz.github.io/ljwx-deploy/evidence/index.json`
- GitHub Project card URL:
- Spec document URL:

### Strict Checklist (all required)
- [ ] Scope and non-scope are explicit.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable.
- [ ] Risks and assumptions are listed.
- [ ] Linked to GitHub Project `Bid-MVP Factory` card.
- [ ] At least one evidence link is attached.

### Blocking Rule
PR must not merge until every checkbox is checked and required links are filled.
